response: {"name":"Blocking RBP binding by antisense oligonucleotide","description":"Antisense oligonucleotide (ASO) transfection in 293T cells to block RBP (RBFOX2) binding sites, followed by RT-PCR-based splicing assay to quantify exon inclusion (PSI) using gel electrophoresis and ImageJ quantification.","data_type":"other","raw_data_source":null,"steps":[{"step_number":1,"description":"Transfect 293T cells in 24-well format with antisense oligonucleotides (ASOs) targeting RBFOX2 binding sites using RNAiMax as transfection reagent;
